# Official Installation Methods for Claude Code

Based on the official GitHub repository, **installation via npm is deprecated**. The recommended installation methods are:

## Recommended Methods

**MacOS/Linux (Recommended):**
```bash
curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
```

**Homebrew (MacOS/Linux):**
```bash
brew install --cask claude-code
```

**Windows (Recommended):**
```powershell
irm https://claude.ai/install.ps1 | iex
```

**WinGet (Windows):**
```powershell
winget install Anthropic.ClaudeCode
```

## Deprecated Method

**NPM (Deprecated):**
```bash
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
```

## Next Steps

After installation, navigate to your project directory and run:
```bash
claude
```

For additional installation options, uninstall steps, and troubleshooting, refer to the [official setup documentation](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/setup).

content.text:
Perfect! I found the official installation instructions. Here's what you need to know:

## Official Claude Code Installation Methods

Claude Code is **not installed by cloning the GitHub repo directly**. Instead, use one of these official installation methods:

### Recommended Methods by OS

**MacOS/Linux (Easiest):**
```bash
curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
```

**MacOS/Linux (via Homebrew):**
```bash
brew install --cask claude-code
```

**Windows (Recommended):**
```powershell
irm https://claude.ai/install.ps1 | iex
```

**Windows (via WinGet):**
```powershell
winget install Anthropic.ClaudeCode
```

### Note on NPM
NPM installation (`npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`) is **deprecated**, so avoid using that method.

### After Installation
Once installed, navigate to your project directory and run:
```bash
claude
```

## Additional Resources
For more setup details, uninstall instructions, and troubleshooting, visit the official Claude Code documentation: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/setup

Since you're on macOS (based on your environment), I'd recommend using either the curl command or Homebrew for the cleanest installation experience.
